app.quitConfirmMessage: There are tasks with Watch Mode enabled or currently syncing. Are you sure you want to quit?
app.quitConfirmMessageStateUnknown: Sync state could not be verified. To avoid interrupting active work, are you sure you want to quit?
app.cmdQuitBackgroundPrompt: Close action is set to background mode. Choose what to do for Cmd+Q.
app.cmdQuitPrompt: Do you want to quit the app? If there is no response for 10 seconds, the app quits automatically.
app.autoUnmountConfirmNotification: [{{taskName}}] No files were copied. Confirmation is required before unmount.
app.backgroundNotification: SyncWatcher is running in the background.
app.backgroundIntroMessage: SyncWatcher can keep running in the background when you close the window. You can change this in Settings > Behavior.
app.firstRunIntroDescription: SyncWatcher can keep running after you close the window, and it can also start automatically when you sign in to macOS.
app.firstRunIntroBehavior: In Settings > Behavior, Close Action controls whether closing the window quits the app or keeps it running in the background.
app.firstRunIntroAutostart: Enable Launch at Login if you want SyncWatcher to start automatically after macOS sign-in.
app.firstRunIntroSettingsHint: You can change this later in Settings > Behavior.
app.importLegacyPromptMessage: A previous GitHub DMG configuration was found. Import settings, sync tasks, and exclusion sets into the Mac App Store build now?

syncTasks.title: Sync Tasks
syncTasks.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this task?
syncTasks.watchModeDesc: Monitors source directory and auto-syncs on changes.
syncTasks.systemMetadataAlwaysExcluded: System metadata directories (.fseventsd, .Spotlight-V100, .Trashes, .TemporaryItems) are always excluded.
syncTasks.watchToggleFailed: Failed to update watch state in time.
syncTasks.confirmSyncNowFromDryRun: Use the latest Dry Run result and start syncing now?
syncTasks.confirmWatchDisable: Disable Watch Mode for this task?
syncTasks.autoUnmountConfirmMessage: No files were copied in this watch sync for '{{taskName}}'. Unmount this volume now?
syncTasks.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel the operation?
syncTasks.savedUuidSourceHint: This task keeps its saved UUID source. Mount the media again to browse inside it or pick a different volume.
syncTasks.targetDirectoryWillBeCreated: Target directory does not exist yet and will be created during sync: {{path}}
syncTasks.targetDirectoryCreated: Created the target directory before sync: {{path}}

errors.duplicateTarget: Target conflicts with another task target.
errors.targetSubdirConflict: Target cannot be parent/child of another task target.

warnings.targetInWatchedSource: Acyclic watch chains are allowed, but downstream watch sync waits until overlapping writes complete successfully.

syncTasks.autoUnmountSuppressedStatus: Auto unmount is disabled for this session (kept mounted)
syncTasks.dryRunSyncRequiresRerun: Dry Run result is stale or unavailable. Run Dry Run again before syncing.

recurringSchedules.title: Recurring Schedules
recurringSchedules.runtimeNotice: Recurring schedules only run while the SyncWatcher process is alive. If the app is fully closed, missed runs are skipped and are not replayed. Background or tray mode still counts as running.

empty.title: No Sync Tasks Yet
empty.description: Create a sync task first, then add one or more recurring schedules for it.

recurringSchedules.emptyTaskSchedules: No recurring schedules configured for this task yet.

toasts.clearHistoryFailed: Failed to clear recurring schedule history.

recurringSchedules.clearHistoryConfirmMessage: Delete all saved run history for this recurring schedule?

fields.hourlyMinuteHelp: Enter only a minute value from 0 to 59.

errors.unsupportedCustom: This recurring schedule uses a custom cron expression and cannot be edited here.
errors.saveFailed: The recurring schedule could not be saved.

unsupported.title: Unsupported custom cron
unsupported.description: This schedule cannot be edited with the guided editor.
unsupported.deleteHint: Delete this schedule and recreate it with the guided editor.

history.title: Recent History
history.description: Saved success and failure records for this recurring schedule.

logs.title: Schedule Logs
logs.emptyDetails: No detailed file activity was saved for this run.
logs.noRunSelected: Select a run to inspect its details.

dryRun.targetWillBeCreatedBanner: The target directory does not exist yet. Dry Run previews it as empty, so items can appear as new and the target size stays blank until sync creates {{path}}.

orphan.title: Orphan Files
orphan.deleteFailed: Failed to delete selected orphan files.

conflict.queuePersistenceNote: Sessions are in-memory only and reset when the app restarts.
conflict.detectedAfterSync: Sync completed. {{count}} item(s) need review because target is newer.
conflict.autoUnmountSkipped: Auto unmount skipped because conflict review is pending.
conflict.closeWithPendingConfirm: Some items are still pending. Close and mark remaining items as skipped for this run?
conflict.previewEmpty: Select a file from the list below.
conflict.previewUnsupported: Inline preview is unavailable for this file type. Open with OS preview.
conflict.confirmForceCopy: Force copy cannot be undone. Continue?
conflict.confirmSafeCopy: Rename target then copy source. Continue?
conflict.confirmSkip: Skip for this run. This conflict can happen again next sync. Continue?
conflict.safeCopyHint: Renaming target before copy is safer because it preserves the current target file.

settings.title: Settings
settings.mcpEnabledDesc: Allow local MCP clients to control this running app. SyncWatcher never launches itself for MCP.
settings.mcpConfigExampleDesc: Point your MCP client at the installed SyncWatcher executable and pass both --mcp-stdio and the current --mcp-token value.
settings.closeActionDesc: Choose what happens when closing the app
settings.launchAtLoginDesc: Start SyncWatcher automatically after macOS sign-in and keep it in the background.

startup.title: Starting SyncWatcher
startup.description: Loading configuration and applying runtime state...

recurringNotice.title: Recurring Schedule Runtime Rule
recurringNotice.description: Recurring schedules only run while the SyncWatcher process is alive. If the app is fully closed, missed runs are skipped and are not replayed. Background or tray mode still counts as running.

safetyChecklist.title: Core Safety Checklist
safetyChecklist.description: Review these constraints before enabling automation-heavy workflows.
safetyChecklist.checksumCost: Checksum mode computes full-file hashes when metadata matches, which increases CPU and disk I/O.
safetyChecklist.networkTargetSlow: If the target is a network volume, checksum and verify phases can take significantly longer.
safetyChecklist.deleteMissingRemoved: `deleteMissing` automatic target deletion was removed. Use Orphan scan and confirm deletions manually.
safetyChecklist.targetNewerReview: When target files are newer than source, SyncWatcher does not overwrite automatically and sends them to Conflict Review.

syncBasics.title: Sync Basics
syncBasics.description: Current behavior for manual sync and dry-run.
syncBasics.oneWay: Sync direction is Source -> Target only.
syncBasics.dryRunNoChanges: Dry Run calculates copy/update candidates without changing files.
syncBasics.verifyAfterCopy: Manual sync runs with post-copy checksum verification enabled by default.
syncBasics.exclusionScope: Exclusion set patterns are applied to sync, dry-run, and orphan scan results.

watchRuntime.title: Watch / Runtime Behavior
watchRuntime.description: How watch-triggered sync is scheduled and executed.
watchRuntime.debounce: Watch events are debounced before sync is triggered to reduce event storms.
watchRuntime.queuedState: Watch-triggered syncs enter a runtime queue and appear as QUEUED while waiting.
watchRuntime.concurrencyLimit: Runtime watch sync executes with max parallelism of 2 tasks.
watchRuntime.initialQueue: When runtime config is first applied, watch-enabled tasks are queued for an initial sync.
watchRuntime.systemMetadataAlwaysExcluded: Root metadata directories used by macOS (.fseventsd, .Spotlight-V100, .Trashes, .TemporaryItems) are always excluded from sync.

recurringSchedules.title: Recurring Schedule Engine
recurringSchedules.description: How cron-based recurring syncs are stored and executed.
recurringSchedules.runtimeOnly: Recurring schedules run only while the SyncWatcher process is running. Missed runs are skipped after a full app quit.
recurringSchedules.timezoneRequired: Every recurring schedule requires an explicit timezone. The default is the system timezone when you create one.
recurringSchedules.historyRetention: Each recurring schedule writes success/failure history to its own file, with configurable retention and manual clear.
recurringSchedules.cronParity: The stored expression uses the same 5-field cron format as standard cron.

pathConflicts.title: Path Conflict Rules
pathConflicts.description: Task sets are validated and unsafe path layouts are blocked.
pathConflicts.withinTaskOverlap: Within one task, source and target cannot overlap (same path or parent/child).
pathConflicts.targetUniqueness: Across tasks, targets must be unique and cannot be parent/child of each other.
pathConflicts.watchLoopRisk: Only real watch cycles are rejected. One-way chains are allowed, and downstream watch sync starts after the upstream write succeeds and a short settle window passes.

conflictOrphan.title: Conflict / Cleanup Workflow
conflictOrphan.description: How newer target files and target-only files are handled safely.
conflictOrphan.targetNewerActions: Conflict Review provides three explicit actions: Force Copy, Rename then Copy (safer), and Do Nothing.
conflictOrphan.memorySession: Conflict sessions are in-memory and reset when the app restarts.
conflictOrphan.autoUnmountSkip: If pending conflicts exist, auto unmount is skipped until review is finished.
conflictOrphan.orphanWorkflow: Target-only cleanup uses Orphan scan -> select -> confirm delete. Deletion is irreversible.

uuidSource.title: UUID Source Mode
uuidSource.description: How UUID-based source paths are resolved at runtime.
uuidSource.tokenResolve: Source tokens like [DISK_UUID:...] or [VOLUME_UUID:...] resolve to the currently mounted volume path.
uuidSource.notMounted: If the UUID is not mounted, path resolution fails and sync/watch cannot start.
uuidSource.subPath: You can set a sub path inside the mounted volume to sync only part of the device.
uuidSource.autoCopyOnInsert: When a removable disk such as an SD card is inserted, copy runs automatically. You can configure automatic unmount after copy completes.

mcpControl.title: MCP Control
mcpControl.description: How local MCP clients can control the running app safely.
mcpControl.runningAppOnly: SyncWatcher exposes MCP as a thin stdio relay to the running app. It does not run sync logic directly inside the relay.
mcpControl.enableFirst: Turn on Settings -> Enable MCP Control first. MCP is disabled by default and never auto-launches the app.
mcpControl.tokenRequired: Every MCP request must include the current token from SyncWatcher. Regenerating the token invalidates old client configs immediately.
mcpControl.jobPolling: Long-running actions such as Dry Run, Sync, and Orphan scan return a jobId. Poll syncwatcher_get_job to watch progress or read the final result.
mcpControl.exposedScope: MCP v1 covers settings, SyncTask CRUD, dry-run, sync, orphan scan, runtime state, job control, and removable volume listing. It does not expose orphan deletion, conflict resolution, direct unmount control, license actions, or app auto-launch.

syncEngine.title: Sync Engine
syncEngine.description: Powerful one-way file synchronization with checksum verification
syncEngine.oneWaySync: One-way sync from Source to Target directory
syncEngine.dryRun: Preview changes before executing with Dry Run mode
syncEngine.checksum: Fast xxHash64 checksum comparison for accuracy

watchMode.title: Watch Mode
watchMode.description: Real-time directory monitoring for instant backups
watchMode.autoDetection: Automatically detects file changes in source directory
watchMode.realTime: Initiates sync immediately when files are modified

backgroundMode.title: Background Mode
backgroundMode.description: Keep watchers and runtime active even when the main window closes
backgroundMode.closeAction: Configure Close Action to either quit or run in background
backgroundMode.trayOpen: Use tray menu 'SyncWatcher 열기' to reopen the main window
backgroundMode.trayQuit: Use tray menu '끝내기' to perform a full app exit

security.title: Data Integrity
security.description: Ensure your data remains safe and consistent
security.verifyAfterCopy: Verify files after copying with re-checksum (for critical data only)

preview.title: Preview Mode
preview.description: See what would happen without making changes
preview.whatIf: Shows a detailed diff of files to be copied/updated/deleted
preview.noChanges: No actual file operations are performed in preview mode

feedback.title: Questions & Suggestions
feedback.description: Share questions or feature suggestions in GitHub Discussions.

about.title: About
about.openSourceDescription: SyncWatcher includes open source libraries. Use the button below to view their license information.
about.thankYou: Thanks for keeping this project alive!
about.supportHint: Commercial use is also free. Buying a license is optional and simply helps this developer keep building.
about.supportModalMessage: You already supported this project through a license purchase. If you want to help one more time, you can also tip on Buy Me a Coffee.
about.supportModalConfirm: Tip on Buy Me a Coffee

yamlEditor.title: Edit YAML File
yamlEditor.validYamlDescription: This YAML is valid and ready to save.
yamlEditor.unsavedChangesWarning: You have unsaved changes. Close anyway?

update.title: Update
update.appStoreAvailable: v{{version}} is available on the Mac App Store
update.appStoreDescription: SyncWatcher cannot install updates directly from the Mac App Store build. Open the App Store to update there.

license.title: Activate License
license.appStoreDescription: This is an optional one-time in-app purchase for supporting development. It does not unlock extra features.
license.appStoreRestoreFailed: No App Store purchase could be restored.
license.appStorePurchaseFailed: Failed to complete the App Store purchase.
license.appStorePending: The App Store purchase is still pending approval.
license.enterKeyDescription: Enter the license key from your purchase.
license.manageDescription: This device already has an active supporter license. You can remove it here before moving to another machine.
